series_metadata.series_title: CAS reports and inquiries by data classification
series_metadata.series_description: Various computer generated reports distributed by OBM to various State Agencies. Classification the reports fall into are: A(Appropriation, B) Trail balance, C) Vendor, D) Grant, E) Capital Project, F) Revenue, G) spending, H) Cash Disbursement, I) Agency Cash Balance, J) Payroll, K) Transaction Processing, L)Intra-State.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three years plus current, then destroy., Paper: Shred
